description: Style Note Carrying around a trendy and fashionable bag is not just about completing your outfit, you can also use your bag to make a style statement. This super cool choice from nike is a must have for your summer and monsoon collection. It'll complete any casual outfit, wear with flip flops and accessories that match your bag. Product Details A black messenger bag with a Nike swoosh in front One long adjustable fabric strap One main compartment with a flap cover with a Velcro closure, internal elasticated, padded pocket with a Velcro closure for your laptop One open pocket, one net compartment and one zippered compartment One zippered compartment over the flap Warranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount) Material and Care 100% polyester Do not machine wash or dry clean Do not bleach or iron Wipe with a damp cloth when necessary and line dry Size Height: 26 cm Width: 43 cm Depth: 10 cm
